questions.question: Define cloud computing according to NIST and explain the three main service models (IaaS, PaaS, SaaS) with examples.
keyPoints: NIST definition: on-demand network access to shared computing resources
IaaS: Infrastructure - VMs, storage, networking (AWS EC2)
PaaS: Platform - development environment (Heroku, App Engine)

questions.question: Compare and contrast traditional IT infrastructure with cloud computing. Discuss the advantages and use cases for each.
keyPoints: Use cases: legacy systems vs modern scalable apps
